news.headline: Investment: $8M for 2.5 years of development, leading to launch of new B2TRADER offering crypto spot, derivatives, Forex, CFDs.
news.summary: In Dubai, B2BROKER has achieved a significant milestone with the expansion of its B2TRADER platform. Since launching the initial development plan in 2022 and introducing the first version of the crypto trading platform in March 2024, the company has invested $8 million over two and a half years in further enhancement. The new version now supports crypto spot, crypto derivatives, Forex, and CFDs, making it a true multi-asset, multi-market trading platform. This development involved a team of 50 engineers.

news.headline: Warning about dangers of humans taking pet medications due to cost difference and similarities.
news.summary: Pet toxicology specialists are cautioning people about potential hazards regarding medications. Some pet medications may seem similar to human medications, but a few are notably cheaper. This discrepancy raises concerns about the safety and effectiveness of these medications for pets.Experts suggest that people should be cautious when administering medications to their pets due to potential risks of toxicity. It's important to consult with a veterinarian before giving any medication to pets.。

news.headline: By 2031, the electronic waste recycling market is projected to reach $84.3 billion, as per a report by Meticulous Research®.
news.summary: In Redding, California, on December 11, 2024, a recent market study was released on the "Electronic Waste Recycling Market." This report delves into various aspects such as Material Type including Metals, Plastics, and Glass, as well as Recycling Technology like Pyrometallurgy and Hydrometallurgy. The report provides insights on the Size, Share, Forecast, and Trends Analysis of the market. It examines the recycling of electronic waste, a growing concern in the modern world. The study discusses how different materials are recycled and the technologies used, offering valuable data for industry players.

news.headline: GDS Wealth Management in DFW named one of D Magazine's 2024 Top Wealth Managers, recognized nationally.
news.summary: Located in the DFW metroplex, GDS Wealth Management has been recognized as one of D Magazine's top wealth managers in 2024. This prestigious award signifies the company's commitment to excellence in the field. D Magazine conducted a thorough review reaching out to all wealth management firms and teams to compile this exclusive list, solidifying GDS Wealth Management's position as a leading firm in the industry. This acknowledgment reflects the dedication and success of GDS Wealth Management, showcasing their prominence in the financial world.

news.headline:
New Political Trade Reported: DWAC - Sell - spouse - $1,000 - $15,000 -  - Morgan McGarvey 
 transaction date: 2024-11-08

Strong AI growth in Q4 cloud revealed by Liftr Insights data. Global increase in AI options and costs.
news.summary: Liftr Insights, a market intelligence firm, has released data showcasing the rapid expansion of artificial intelligence (AI) worldwide. The report, based on objective numbers, reveals significant growth in AI utilization in the cloud sector. news.headline: Danbury to get GoNetspeed's 100% fiber internet in 2025 through $7.6 million investment, benefiting 14,300+ homes and businesses.
news.summary: In Danbury, Connecticut, GoNetspeed has revealed plans to extend its 100% fiber-optic network to the community. The city will benefit from high-speed, symmetrical internet thanks to GoNetspeed's $7.6 million private investment in the project. Construction is set to commence in early 2025, with over 14,300 homes and businesses in Danbury gaining access to the advanced fiber technology once the work is finished. This initiative aims to provide residents and businesses in the area with reliable and efficient internet services.

news.headline: Clear Peak Capital partners with ITsynch, a fleet management software provider for cruise and maritime industries. CEO: Alejandro Oscar De Carli, COO: Jorge de la Cruz.
news.summary: Clear Peak Capital, a private equity firm based in Orlando, Florida, has partnered with ITsynch, a prominent provider of fleet management software solutions catering to the cruise and maritime sectors. ITsynch, led by CEO Alejandro Oscar De Carli and COO Jorge de la Cruz, has reached a significant stage with this collaboration. Clear Peak's focus on software and IT services aligns with ITsynch's growth goals in offering innovative solutions. This cooperation is a strategic move for ITsynch, underlining its dedication to advancing in the industry.

news.headline: RESOLVE 2024 event in Abu Dhabi concluded with impactful sessions on global dispute resolution, as part of Abu Dhabi Finance Week.
news.summary: Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates - On December 11, 2024, the much-awaited RESOLVE 2024 event, organized by ADGM Courts and the ADGM Dispute Resolution Hearing Centre (DHRC), wrapped up on the second day of Abu Dhabi Finance Week (ADFW). The event saw significant discussions on global dispute resolution, attracting a large audience.

news.headline: XRP has surged 10.25% in 24hrs to $2.41, contrasting the 7% week-long loss from $2.57. All-time high is $3.40.
news.summary: The price of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has risen by 10.25% in the last 24 hours to reach $2.41, marking a shift from the previous week where it had dropped by 7.0% from $2.57. Currently, the coin's all-time high is at $3.40. The chart illustrating the price fluctuations and volatility can be found in the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GE Vernova projects $36-$37 billion in revenues for 2025, with focus on organic investments and shareholder returns. Challenges noted in wind sector.
news.summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) held its 2024 Investor Update event on Tuesday to share its financial projections and capital allocation plan. CFO Ken Parks stated their commitment to maintaining an investment grade balance sheet while investing in organic growth, targeted M&A, and returning at least one-third of cash generation to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases. The company predicts revenues for 2025 to range between $36 billion and $37 billion, slightly below the consensus of $37.25 billion, reflecting mid-single-digit organic growth. Additionally, recent economic challenges and Trump's presidency have led to a tougher outlook for renewable energy stocks, according to Morgan Stanley. For more details, the complete report is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dwight Capital & Dwight Mortgage Trust finance $260.5MM in November with notable transactions including a $51.8MM HUD loan for Integra Isles Apartments.
news.summary: In Miami, Dwight Capital and its affiliate REIT, Dwight Mortgage Trust (DMT), finalized real estate financings totaling $260.5 million in November. Key deals comprised a HUD loan for Integra Isles Apartments, alongside bridge loans for Willow Creek Apartments and a trio of skilled nursing facilities. A significant transaction involved a $51.8 million HUD 221(d)(4) construction loan for the construction of Integra Isles, a forthcoming 264-unit market rate apartment complex.

news.summary: Over the last four years, expenses have surged by 32%, largely due to prevalent health issues in the United States. news.summary: In San Francisco, Copy.ai's Go-To-Market AI platform witnessed an impressive 480% revenue increase in 2024. This growth can be attributed to enterprise companies opting to swap out disparate AI tools for a unified GTM AI platform.

This marks the fifth consecutive year the organization has published this report, focusing on diversity within Canada's tech industry. The report highlights important statistics and trends in the sector, providing valuable insights for stakeholders.

news.headline: EnCharge AI CEO Dr. Naveen Verma awarded 2024 Edison Patent Award for Computing Innovation. Ceremony held on Nov 21, 2024 in NJ.
news.summary: The CEO of EnCharge AI, Dr. Naveen Verma, was awarded the 2024 Edison Patent Award in Computing Technology by the Research & Development Council of New Jersey for their groundbreaking "Configurable In-Memory Computing Engine" patent. This award, the highest recognition of innovation in the state, was presented during a ceremony on November 21, 2024, at Bell Works in Holmdel, NJ. news.headline: Navitus partners with Learn to Live to provide mental health solutions; offers CBT services to clients, aiding in managing health costs for members.

Statistics show that nearly 50% of Americans will require mental health support.

news.headline: SentinelOne excels in 2024 MITRE ATT&CK® Evaluations: Enterprise with 100% detection and 88% fewer alerts than median.
news.summary: A recent evaluation by MITRE ATT&CK® in 2024 has revealed that SentinelOne® (NYSE: S) based in Mountain View, Calif., continues to lead in detecting advanced threats. The AI-powered Singularity™ Platform by SentinelOne achieved a perfect 100% detection rate and zero delays in detecting 80 out of 80 attacks across every stage in the evaluation. This marks the fifth consecutive year that SentinelOne has excelled in this third-party assessment, setting a high standard in threat detection capabilities.

The partnership has led to almost complete adoption of password management tools by clients, totaling nearly 100%. Cybernet Evolution, operating within various sectors including healthcare, education, and automotive, leverages the Bitwarden partner program to provide cutting-edge security services. This initiative highlights the increasing demand for robust security solutions in diverse industries.

news.headline: Mindset Medical's contactless pulse rate device, IVC App, cleared by FDA with Series A financing.

The clearance for the IVC App is notable as it permits healthcare providers to gather pulse rate physiological measurements.

news.summary: A company based in San Francisco and Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, eGrowcery, is expanding its range of products to meet the needs of retailers better and provide more payment options for customers.

news.headline: Nov CPI report may steer Fed rate cut in Dec; S&P 500 up. Core inflation sticky but rate cut likely. Fed anticipated to cut rates on Dec. 18.
news.summary: Market analysts anticipate a Federal Reserve rate reduction on Dec. 18, with the possibility of a hawkish stance for the upcoming year following the release of the November Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation report. The report indicates that while core inflation remains unchanged, a rate cut by the Fed is highly likely. Along with this news, the S&P 500 index has experienced a rise.

This new series aims to boost efficiency and accuracy, offering reliable, high-performance devices suitable for personal workstations and commercial settings. The enhanced Swingline® Optima® series includes five new models, catering to a variety of needs.

news.summary: Interactive Brokers, a leading financial services company trading on Nasdaq under the symbol IBKR, has revealed the launch of AI-generated news summaries as part of its News & Research service. This advancement aims to enhance the user experience by providing concise and insightful updates on market trends and developments. Investors can now access automated news summaries for efficient decision-making.

news.headline: GroupBy partners with adCAPTCHA to enhance eCommerce security, aiming to combat bots accounting for 50% global web traffic.
news.summary: In Toronto, GroupBy Inc., a prominent player in SaaS-based eCommerce search and product discovery, has unveiled a key collaboration with adCAPTCHA, an innovative security verification platform. The partnership intends to enhance digital customer journeys by integrating strong security protocols with tailored product discovery during shopping. With bots representing 50% of worldwide web traffic, these entities aim to tackle this substantial threat to eCommerce, a menace that results in losses totaling millions of dollars.

news.headline: AI-driven breast cancer research abstracts by iCAD presented at SABCS 2024 show improved detection, risk prediction across diverse populations. Study on Breast Arterial Calcifications (BAC) identified a higher prevalence in women with mammographically detected breast cancer. Full article on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: iCAD, Inc. announced that four AI-driven breast cancer research abstracts have been accepted for presentation at the 2024 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium. The abstracts aim to improve detection and risk prediction accuracy in breast health AI and address disparities in diverse populations. The research includes a 10-year image-derived AI-risk model showing higher discriminatory performance than the clinical Tyrer-Cuzick v8 risk model. The ProFound AI Breast Health Suite plays a critical role in early cancer detection and risk prediction. The studies highlight the transformative potential of AI in improving outcomes for all demographics, with one abstract showcasing an AI algorithm identifying Breast Arterial Calcifications (BAC) in screening mammograms based on race, age, and cancer status. The study suggests that BAC could serve as an effective cardiovascular biomarker across racial groups and highlights a higher prevalence of BAC in women with mammographically detected breast cancer. AI technology is seen as key to improving patient outcomes and driving growth in healthcare markets.

news.headline: Pickleball pro Parris Todd signs partnership with Franklin Sports, enhancing their roster for future.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The number of new jobs created last month reached a total of 250,000, exceeding expectations of economists. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 2.5% in response to the positive economic news. Experts attribute these improvements to a boost in consumer spending and confidence in the market. The government has also announced plans to further stimulate the economy through investments in infrastructure and small businesses. Despite these positive developments, concerns remain regarding inflation rates and the ongoing global trade tensions. Overall, the outlook for the country's economy appears promising, with indications of continued growth and stability.

This impressive advancement is fueled by the rising need for high-capacity batteries to enhance the driving range of EVs, as well as the increasing demand for electric vehicles in general.

news.headline: CRO services market to hit $188.54 billion by 2030 with 12.6% CAGR growth due to outsourcing trend in biotech/pharma.

Contract Research Organizations (CROs) are providing services such as conducting clinical trials, offering regulatory support, and managing data. This trend is driven by the need for specialized expertise and cost-efficiency in the industry. The market is witnessing substantial expansion with a noticeable increase in the outsourcing of research activities.

news.headline: Origami Sake launches ZERO, 1st non-alcoholic sake in the US, made in Arkansas with 100% locally sourced ingredients.

news.headline: Blushington expanding with two franchise locations in Houston, Texas, marks national growth with second and third locations.
news.summary: Blushington, a luxury beauty franchise offering A-List services for all customers, has revealed their expansion into the Texas market. news.headline: Vera Bradley's Q3 sales dropped 30%, revenue at $80.58M, stock slips. Initiating change in business model.
news.summary: Shares of Vera Bradley, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRA) saw a decline in trading on Wednesday following the release of their third-quarter financial results. The company reported net sales of $80.58 million for the quarter, marking a significant decrease of almost 30% compared to the previous year. CEO Jackie Ardrey acknowledged the challenges faced during this period, attributing them to the ongoing implementation of 'Project Restoration' aimed at overhauling the business model and repositioning the Vera Bradley brand. The Vera Bradley Direct segment generated revenues of $52.5 million, representing a 27.4% decline year over year. Comparable sales also took a hit, dropping by 27.2% in the third quarter.

news.headline: iQIYI (NASDAQ:IQ) introduces 'Extra Large Font' feature on app for improved accessibility to cater to senior users and others with visual needs.
news.summary: Shares of iQIYI, Inc. (NASDAQ: IQ) are up in premarket trading on Monday following the announcement of the new 'Extra Large Font' feature on their app. This feature aims to improve accessibility for senior users and individuals with visual impairments. The enhanced font size options now include the 'Extra Large Font', allowing for larger text sizes to cater to various visual needs. Users can easily adjust the interface and functionality of the app with a single click, offering a more user-friendly entertainment experience. The activation of this feature includes important accessibility enhancements.

news.headline: SABCS 2024: iCAD's AI study finds higher BAC prevalence in breast cancer patients, indicating potential for cardiovascular assessment alongside cancer treatment.
news.summary: A recent study found that breast arterial calcifications (BAC) are more common in breast cancer patients, with a prevalence rate of over 70%. This indicates a potential link between BAC and breast cancer. The study suggests the importance of conducting cardiovascular assessments alongside cancer treatment. These findings emphasize the need for comprehensive care that addresses both oncological and cardiovascular concerns in breast cancer patients.
